curation_notes: Patch commit is the squash-merge of PR #13505 into main. Only one source file was changed: python/semantic_kernel/connectors/in_memory.py. The patch adds a blocklist of dangerous Python dunder attributes (blocked_filter_attributes) and validates AST Attribute nodes against it in _parse_and_validate_filter. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern — the filter parsing and eval logic is unique to the InMemoryCollection class. Pre-assigned class command-injection retained: CWE-94 (Code Injection) maps to command-injection as the sandbox escape via eval leads to arbitrary code/command execution.
